couldNotBeActivated.en: Your account could not be activated.

hasAlreadyBeenActivated.en: Your account has already been activated.

hasBeenActivated.en: Your account has been successfully activated.
hasBeenActivated.sv: Ditt konto har aktiverats med ett lyckat resultat.

invalidLink.en: The activation link provided is invalid.

activateAccount.en: You need to activate your account.

invalidCredentials.en: Your e-mail address and password are invalid.
invalidCredentials.sv: Du har angivit fel e-postadress och lösenord.

permissionDenied.en: You do not have permission to perform this operation.
permissionDenied.sv: Du saknar behörighet att utföra denna operation.
